# Account Analytic Tag Distribution

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:e0c36b770fce78a14522a35fcb9aa6bdbe4090c1f07409021d106c21a9ea8355
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module restores the option to define the analytical distribution at the level of analytical labels.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

1. In the creation/editing of an analytic label check the box "Analytic Distribution" and define the distribution you need.
2. Define this label in an invoice line.
3. Publish the invoice.
4. The analytical notes will have been created according to the analytical distribution of the defined tags.

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/account-analytic/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/account-analytic/issues/new?body=module:%20account_analytic_tag_distribution%0Aversion:%2016.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_analytic_tag_distribution.models.account_move_line.AccountMoveLine._onchange_analytic_tag_ids
documentation:
If any tag has a distribution, we will disable the standard analytical
distribution.

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_analytic_tag_distribution.models.account_move_line.AccountMoveLine._prepare_analytic_lines
documentation:
If any tag has distribution, we will not call super() to avoid conflicts
with standard flow.
